Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Checklist Completed after the execution of SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average waiting time to the SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days following Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and the subsequent occurrence of SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to be followed by any checklist completion activity across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days measured until the case reaches SW-Awaiting EIC Decision

Name: Minimum time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to Manuscript Export Succeeded in cases where plagiarism checks are repeated

Name: Time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants where reviewer assignment occurs after checklist completion
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to SW-EIC Reject in rejected submissions
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to transition to a decision state (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, or SW-EIC Major Revision)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Average time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and the final export event (Manuscript Export Succeeded) marking case closure
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
